race.comment: EXORBITANT MISS (10) is racing well and is close to a win, the latest effort a solid third at Scone over 1700m. Has her share of talent and looks the one to beat in this suitable race. FINED FOR SPEEDING (11) was far from his best last time but his prior form measures right up. Gets in light with the 2kg claim and draws well. Not underestimating. THE CONFIDANTE (7) was a brave maiden winner two back then never stopped trying last time when chasing gamely into fourth at a big price. Doesn't need to improve much to be right there again. SNOW DOG (3) also got off the mark two back but was less effective last time. Mixing form but remains in the mix,
